_comment: Base config for Comprehensive Examination in Spanish sessions. Per-session fields (eyebrow, qs_intro, fc_*) are filled by scripts/spanish_session_config.py — do not scaffold directly from this file.
qs_title: ⭐ ¡REGENTS RUSH! — The Comprehensive Spanish Quiz Show
qs_tagline: The Comprehensive Spanish Regents Quiz Spectacular
qs_intro:
{MC} multiple-choice questions from the {SESSION_LONG} Comprehensive Spanish Regents — listening passages, readings, real ads & notices, and cloze.
Climb the money ladder to $1,000,000 · build 🔥 streaks for 2× and 3× multipliers · win trophies at 10, 20, 30 and {MC} correct.
Real exam documents on screen — click any image to zoom. Two 50:50s and one Skip. 30–50 seconds a question. Keys 1–4 work.
qs_prizes:
{at:10, emoji:'🥉', name:'EL TROFEO DE BRONCE', desc:'¡10 correct! ¡Fenomenal! The Bronze Trophy of the Bodega is YOURS!'},
  {at:20, emoji:'🔔', name:'LA CAMPANA DE PLATA', desc:'¡20 correct! ¡Increíble! Ring the Silver Bell across the plaza!'},
  {at:30, emoji:'☀️', name:'EL SOL DE ORO', desc:'¡30 correct! ¡Brillante! The Golden Sun shines on your Spanish!'},
  {at:{MC}, emoji:'🏆', name:'LA CORONA DE PLATINO', desc:'¡A PERFECT {MC}/{MC}! ¡Campeón! La Corona de Platino crowns the master of the Comprehensive Spanish Regents!'}
index_blurb: Practice with the quiz show, then drill the full deck with flashcards. The exam's listening passages, readings, ads, and pictures are built into every question.
fc_sub: Flash cards · {TOTAL} cards from the exam
